title: Security guard for railway work
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
what_we_expect: Security guard qualification (T-man certificate), valid occupational safety and track safety card are also mandatory
Fluent knowledge of the Finnish language
You are reliable and have a good attitude towards work
Your benefits can be counted (but not necessary!) if you also have:
Travel readiness. The state railway network covers the whole of Finland.
B driver's license and car available.
Here are a few more reasons why you should choose the Additional service:

1 With us, as a job seeker and worker, you get truly personal service. You meet us face to face already during the job search phase. When you are employed through us, you will receive a designated contact person from us who will help you in all matters related to the employment relationship.
2 Our customer base in the construction industry is really diverse. That's why we are able to offer a wide range of different tasks, with something for everyone.
3 Thanks to our large customer base, jobs are constantly available, and when one job ends, you can soon be employed at the next job site, depending on your skills.
jobcontent:
ADDITIONAL SERVICE - THE RIGHT PEOPLE FOR THE RIGHT JOBS

 

We are now looking for a security guard for railway work in the SME region. Your days will be spent in track maintenance and construction tasks as part of a team of professionals. Work is available until the end of the season.

What do we expect from you?

 Security guard qualification (T-man certificate), valid occupational safety and track safety card are also mandatory

 Fluent knowledge of the Finnish language

 You are reliable and have a good attitude towards work

 

Your benefits can be counted (but not necessary!) if you also have:

 Travel readiness. The state railway network covers the whole of Finland.

 B driver's license and car available.

 

Here are a few more reasons why you should choose the Additional service:

1 With us, as a job seeker and worker, you get truly personal service. You meet us face to face already during the job search phase. When you are employed through us, you will receive a designated contact person from us who will help you in all matters related to the employment relationship.

2 Our customer base in the construction industry is really diverse. That's why we are able to offer a wide range of different tasks, with something for everyone.

3 Thanks to our large customer base, jobs are constantly available, and when one job ends, you can soon be employed at the next job site, depending on your skills.

4 We stick to agreed matters and do what we promise. You can focus on your work, because we take care of the extra bureaucracy for you.

 

Does that sound good? Great, we want to hear from you soon!

If we made you interested and you would like to join the Additional service team, send us an application as soon as possible! Put my experience and qualifications in your application.

Põhpalvelu is a domestic company that was founded in 2002 and offers flexible personnel solutions. The additional service group is known for its reliability and long-term customer relationships among both employers and employees. We employ more than 3,000 employees every year, and we are a strong player in many fields: we offer jobs, e.g. in the restaurant, construction, industrial, maintenance, logistics, office, cleaning and trade sectors. We are among the ten largest personnel service companies in Finland, and we are a member of the Human Resources Association Hela ry. 

We want to make going to work easy for you: through us, you can find employment the very next day. We constantly offer jobs for different life situations, and the temporary work done through us has been a route to permanent employment for many of our employees.

title: Early childhood education teacher / Länsimetsä daycare center
what_we_offer: The salary for this position is €2823/month.
The salary is determined according to the OVTES standard salary system.
The trial period is six months.
Before starting work, the person selected for the position must present a doctor's statement about his health (T-certificate) and a criminal record extract in accordance with Act 504/2002.

The Infectious Diseases Act (Section 55) obliges those working with children under school age to investigate the risk of tuberculosis infection. The questionnaire and interpretation instructions prepared by the Institute of Occupational Health are used as the tuberculosis questionnaire.
Those invited to the interview will bring their original degree and employment certificates with them.
jobcontent:
We are looking for an early childhood education teacher for Länsimetsä daycare center.

Länsimetsä daycare operates five groups of children and is located in Gerbyy, Vaasa, in a quiet area. We have good hiking and exercise opportunities, nature and the forest are right next to the kindergarten. The nursery also has a fenced yard area, e.g. for sports games.

The early childhood education teacher is responsible for the group's high-quality pedagogy, planning and evaluation, as well as cooperation with parents.

The eligibility requirement is eligibility for the position of early childhood education teacher in accordance with § 26 (transition provision § 75) of the Early Childhood Education Act (540 / 2018). 
A pre-teaching qualification is considered an advantage.

We read to our advantage
- strong pedagogical approach
- activity and initiative
- good interaction skills to support the well-being of the work community, children and families
- flexibility to act in changing everyday situations

Good cooperation and interaction skills are emphasized as the selection criteria.

We offer a job where you can use your own strengths to everyone's delight, enthusiastic and fun customers and a nice and humorous work community. Can that phrase also be used in this announcement?

In addition, we offer benefits for city services, an employee bicycle benefit, and the e-pass culture, exercise and well-being benefit. 

The salary for this position is €2823/month. 
The salary is determined according to the OVTES standard salary system.

The trial period is six months.

Before starting work, the person selected for the position must present a doctor's statement about his health (T-certificate) and a criminal record extract in accordance with Act 504/2002.

The Infectious Diseases Act (Section 55) obliges those working with children under school age to investigate the risk of tuberculosis infection. The questionnaire and interpretation instructions prepared by the Institute of Occupational Health are used as the tuberculosis questionnaire. 

Those invited to the interview will bring their original degree and employment certificates with them.

Our education professionals walk alongside the children and young people of Vaasa from the gate of the kindergarten until the last spring party on the school road. Thanks to our experts, Vaasa offers a wide range of high-quality cultural and library services, the joy of exercise and insights at colleges for young people and adults alike.

Kindergarten director Päivi Ahlsved, tel. 040 575 0372

title: Caregivers for home care in Tammisaari for full-time work
jobapply_link: mailto:info@samscare.fi?subject=Application for the Job - Lähihoitajia kotihoitoon Tammisaareen kokopäivätyöhön
what_we_expect: to work in a multicultural environment in healthcare
to assess the elderly's ability to take care of themselves
ensure the safety of healthcare customers
what_we_offer: Versatile work. The position includes office and customer work.
Competitive salary
Flexible working hours and the possibility to influence work shifts
Varied trainings and good orientation
jobcontent:
Due to our growing number of customers, we are looking for more care professionals to join our team.

The daily tasks include, among other things, assisting customers in their daily activities, basic care, performing procedures, medical treatment and office work. The possibility to work only on weekdays.

The work would start as soon as possible.

For the task you must have:

Nursing degree

Good oral and written Finnish language skills. Studies in Finnish or Swedish, or B2 level language certificate The position requires a LOP/LOVe medical license

B driver's license

What we offer:

Versatile work. The position includes office and customer work.

Competitive salary

Flexible working hours and the possibility to influence work shifts

Varied trainings and good orientation

Applications by email to info@samscare.fi

title: Warehouse worker (language skills Ukraine)
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
jobcontent:
We are looking for a Ukrainian-speaking warehouse worker for our customer company in a cold storage. 

For the selected person, we will conduct an entry-to-work inspection at the occupational health service.

Work starts immediately. 
The duration of the work is until the end of August.

We interview applicants already during the application process and the position will be filled immediately
after the person is found.

If you are the person we are looking for, please submit an application, thank you. 
 
 
Rentaman provides skilled labor for the customer's needs.

title: Excavator driver for Pirkanmaa
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
what_we_expect: The works start according to the agreement and the sites are located e.g. In Tampere, Ylöjärvi, Nokia and Orivede.
Job description:
Construction of roads, streets and avenues
Municipal engineering construction works
Usual foundation work
Working with 250t excavators (wheeled and tracked)
Previous experience as an excavator driver
Ability to work independently and carefully
Finnish language skills
3D knowledge is considered an advantage
job_responsibilities: refueling equipment operator, aircraft fuel distribution
jobcontent:
Maximus Rakennusala's solid employer with almost 25 years of experience!

We are looking for a skilled excavator driver for versatile infrastructure projects in the Pirkanmaa area.

The works start according to the agreement and the sites are located e.g. In Tampere, Ylöjärvi, Nokia and Orivede.

Job description:

 * Construction of roads, streets and avenues
 * Municipal engineering construction works
 * Usual ground construction works
 * Working with 250t excavators (wheeled and tracked)

We expect from you:

 * Previous experience as an excavator driver
 * Ability to work independently and carefully
 * Finnish language skills
 * 3D knowledge is considered an advantage

As a Maximus employee, you get:

 * Väylä's various job opportunities are up to you, depending on your experience base and your wishes
 * With one application of the simple application process, you are included in other searches as well
 * High-quality tools and equipment (e.g. Makita)
 * Occupational health services at your disposal in Pihlajalinna
 * Competitive salary - we value your professionalism and contribution
 * The possibility of establishment and the possibility of long-term employment

Applying: If you feel that this job is for you, send us your application. We start processing applications already during the application period, and the search ends when suitable people are found.

More information about the position: customer manager Jarno Oikkonen, tel: 050 405 9770, available on weekdays between 8 a.m. and 4 p.m.

Maximus Oy Almost 25 years of experience in building construction, building technology and infrastructure. We are a stable and strong Finnish employer. 

At Maximus, we have strong industry expertise in building construction, building technology and infrastructure. Our almost 25 years of experience and our exceptionally wide network are at the top of the field. We are a solvent company, whose positive atmosphere and professional organization have created a strong reputation for us as an employer. Get to know us in more detail on our website - we really have fun!

title: Hoiva assistant, Onnelanpollu service center, Lahti
jobcontent:
Is elderly care close to your heart? To strengthen our professional team, we are now looking for a care assistant for a fixed-term employment relationship for the period 11.5.-17.12.2026 in Kultaranta, Onnelanpolu service center! 

At the Onnelanpolu service center, we offer round-the-clock, safe and high-quality serviced housing for the elderly. Kultaranta is a 48-bed 24-hour serviced housing unit in the cozy Onnelanpolu service center. We have a lot of elderly people who need help and support, who often also have some degree of memory loss. 

With us, you can use your skills in kitchen and clothing maintenance tasks as well as nursing assistant tasks and other support tasks. We offer you versatile, meaningful and fulfilling work as well as a good orientation in our positive and inspiring work community. Nice co-workers and a supportive supervisor will always support you. You will succeed in your work if you are self-initiative, cooperative and have a cheerful and brisk approach to work. We hope that you want to be involved in doing good work for the elderly and building a sense of home for our residents. 

We invest in everyone having fun coming to work. You will mainly work in two shifts, but the task may also include three-shift work from time to time. Occasionally, the task may therefore also include night shifts. We strive to support the reconciliation of work, family and free time; with us, you can influence your work shifts yourself. 

As a member of our work community, you get: 

- A work community that is proud of its profession and a supportive atmosphere that helps keep the motivation right 
- Smooth coordination of working life with everyday life, we are part of Väestöliitti's Family-friendly workplace program 
- Occupational health services and the Health application that belongs to them 
 
We also value quality free time. You get access to the Epassi Flex package including exercise, cultural and wellness benefits. The benefit can be up to 400 euros per calendar year, depending on the duration of the employment relationship. In addition, we offer vacation benefits as well as community events and recreation days. Each of our employees is a member of the employee association Pähe ry. Pähi has several leisure departments, from choir to floorball, and it often manages to negotiate cheaper tickets for us for events in the area and discounts for various services. 

We require the training of a care assistant for the position. We consider it an advantage to complete a hygiene passport. Vaccination coverage according to Section 48 of the Infectious Diseases Act is required for the position. Our working language is Finnish, so we expect fluent oral and written Finnish language skills of at least B1 level. 

Those who work with the elderly must present an acceptable extract from the criminal record referred to in section 6, subsection 2 of the Criminal Records Act (Act on Social and Health Care Supervision 741/2023 § 28).

We review applications already during the application period and fill the position once a suitable person is found, so please submit your application soon. 

Welcome to our happy group!

There are almost 8,000 of us employees in the Päijät-Häme welfare area, and we are the largest employer in the province. In addition to social and health care and rescue professionals, we employ experts from several different professional groups. 

Equality and equality are important to us - that's why we hope for versatile applications from people of different backgrounds and age groups, as well as people of different genders. In accordance with our values, our operations are based on trust, we are brave, we care about our employees as well as our customers.

Service supervisor, Taru Luukkonen
tel. 044 416 3164
taru.luukkonen@paijatha.fi

Responsible nurse, Virpi Kuustie
tel. 044 729 7251
virpi.kuustie@paijatha.fi

title: Professional instructor for the real estate service industry, Riihimäki
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
what_we_expect: experience in real estate and/or cleaning services
practical knowledge of the tasks in the field
interest in guidance and teaching work
good communication skills
driver's license (car not necessary)
Your advantage is:
degree in the field (e.g. basic degree in real estate or cleaning services)
experience in training or supervising work
Employment:
start as soon as possible
jobcontent:
Professional instructor real estate service industry (Riihimäki)

We are looking for a professional instructor to support teaching real estate services at the Riihimäki campus. In this position, you work as a teacher's work partner and you get to guide students in practical tasks as part of their studies. The person suitable for the job must have a few years of experience in property maintenance tasks.

The work is versatile and mobile, sometimes you work independently and sometimes together with the teacher. You guide students in practical training in a campus environment and play an important role in supporting their learning. 
The students are both young and adults, so the work emphasizes good interaction skills and the ability to meet different learners.

The work mainly takes place on the Riihimäki campus (Sakonkatu 1), but the task also includes movement in other areas of the campus. The days are practical and you accompany the student group, guiding their work.

We expect you to:
experience in real estate and/or cleaning services
practical knowledge of the tasks in the field
interest in guidance and teaching work
good communication skills
driver's license (car not necessary)

Your advantage is:
degree in the field (e.g. basic degree in real estate or cleaning services)
experience in training or supervising work

Employment:
temporary replacement until 31 October 2026
start as soon as possible
working hours on weekdays between 7:17 a.m. (working day 7.5 h)
students are generally there at 816
no work in July (no students)

This position is ideal for you who have strong practical experience in the field and an interest in moving into supervisory or teaching positions now or in the future.

Were you interested?
Apply and come and do meaningful work with students!

Bolt.Works is a national personnel service company. We are a fair employer, and we will help you at all stages of your career. We have a good atmosphere, great colleagues and the best application in the industry, through which you can take care of matters related to your employment with a couple of clicks. We always pay a salary commensurate with the task, your work experience and skills, as well as a bonus for excellent work performance. Occupational health services belong to you from day one. As a member of HELA and RT, we always operate according to the common rules of the game. So join the Bolttian gang, and you're guaranteed to be in the best company!

translated_content:
Professional instructor for the real estate service industry, Riihimäki

Professional instructor real estate service industry (Riihimäki)

We are looking for a professional instructor to support teaching real estate services at the Riihimäki campus. In this position, you work as a teacher's work partner and you get to guide students in practical tasks as part of their studies. The person suitable for the job must have a few years of experience in property maintenance tasks.

The work is versatile and mobile, sometimes you work independently and sometimes together with the teacher. You guide students in practical training in a campus environment and play an important role in supporting their learning. 
The students are both young and adults, so the work emphasizes good interaction skills and the ability to meet different learners.

The work mainly takes place on the Riihimäki campus (Sakonkatu 1), but the task also includes movement in other areas of the campus. The days are practical and you accompany the student group, guiding their work.

We expect you to:
experience in real estate and/or cleaning services
practical knowledge of the tasks in the field
interest in guidance and teaching work
good communication skills
driver's license (car not necessary)

Your advantage is:
degree in the field (e.g. basic degree in real estate or cleaning services)
experience in training or supervising work

Employment:
temporary replacement until 31 October 2026
start as soon as possible
working hours on weekdays between 7:17 a.m. (working day 7.5 h)
students are generally there at 816
no work in July (no students)

title: Lord of the Church
what_we_expect: prepare religious services
supervise religious communities
give spiritual advice
perform religious ceremonies
represents a religious institution
promote dialogue in society
participate in discussions
hold a church service
observe confidentiality
reinforces positive behavior
jobcontent:
The Judiciary Chapter of Kuopio Diocese declares the position of Vicar of Lieksa Parish vacant. The vicar is elected in an interim election. The position will become vacant on April 1, 2027.

Applicants for the office of vicar must have completed a pastoral degree and a degree in parish work management from the Finnish ev.lut. the priest of the church. The position requires excellent oral and written Finnish language skills and a satisfactory understanding of Swedish.

The eligibility requirements for the office of vicar and the requirements and tasks related to the office are regulated in the Church Act, the Act on the Office Holder of the Evangelical Lutheran Church and the church order. The parish of Lieksa has announced that the special needs of the vicar of the parish of Lieksa are:

\- good interaction and cooperation skills in relation to parishioners, employees, volunteers and trustees;

\- versatile leadership skills;

\- good administrative skills and spiritual leadership and the development of worship life;

\- the ability to recognize changes in the operating environment and to develop and renew operating methods together with the personnel;

\- the ability to network with various ecclesiastical actors and stakeholders;

\- the ability to visualize broad entities, lead strategic work;

\- the desire and the conditions to develop their knowledge and skills in administrative tasks and apply it in their work; as well as

\- good communication skills and the ability to lead, utilizing the possibilities of modern communication.

The application period starts on 18 April 2026 and ends on 25 May 2026 at 15:00. Applications addressed to the Judiciary Chapter of Kuopio Diocese are submitted via the KirkkoRekry service (https://kirkkorekry.fi/fi/tyopaikat/lieksan-seurakunnan-kirkkoherran-virka-4997/). The application must be accompanied by a letter of title from your own judicial chapter (for applying for the office of vicar, no more than 2 months old) and a medical certificate (T-form, no more than 6 months old). The person elected to the position must present an acceptable extract from the criminal record, which is required by the law on investigating the criminal background of those working with children.

Applicants should prepare for the interview, which will take place at the Judiciary Chapter of the Diocese of Kuopio on June 4, 2026 in Kuopio. Interviewees will be notified of a more specific interview time. Some applicants may be sent for a suitability assessment.

For more information about the position, please contact vicar Lea El Bardi, lea.elbardi@evl.fi, tel. 0400 991 653.

Website: lieksanseurakunta.fi

The Judiciary Chapter of the Diocese of Kuopio

The parish of Lieksa, located in the landscape of cultural landscapes, Pielinen, Koli and Ruunaa, is a parish of more than 6,500 members and the city of Lieksa has 9,800 inhabitants. In addition to the vicar, the parish has 20 permanent positions and activities.

Lieksa parish is the most forested parish in Finland. The income from forestry partly secures the parish's operating conditions.

The congregation considers all age groups in its activities, from babies to the elderly. The parish's strengths are a functioning work community and encouraging trustees. Traditional revivalist movements and organizations operate in the parish. Cooperation with the Orthodox and Pentecostal churches is good.

Lieksa has good hobby, exercise and leisure opportunities for all ages.

See the job description above.

title: Nurse, Mental Health and Substance Abuse Services, Turku
what_we_expect: The eligibility requirement is the legalization of a nurse in accordance with the Act on Healthcare Professionals (559/1994).
Apply for a position and become part of a team where your work matters every day.
what_we_offer: You get involved in activities where your skills are valued and your views are listened to. You get the support of a multi-professional team and the support of your supervisors. Our community is built on cooperation, openness and the desire to develop activities together.
jobcontent:
In the work of a replacement care nurse, you combine drug treatment and psychosocial support - you are part of a unit where your professionalism and vision really make an impact.

Your assignment

As a nurse, you work as part of a multi-professional team for reimbursement care. You are responsible for the comprehensive implementation of compensation treatment, which includes, in addition to drug treatment, the provision of various forms of psychosocial support. You can also get training for these. 

The patients are adults, and you work in close cooperation with the entire unit's staff - developing and improving together.

The job is a day job, and it also includes weekend shifts. A 6-month trial period is observed in the employment relationship.

What do we offer you?

You get involved in activities where your skills are valued and your views are listened to. You get the support of a multi-professional team and the support of your supervisors. Our community is built on cooperation, openness and the desire to develop activities together.

What do we expect from you?

We expect you to have good collaboration skills, initiative, flexibility and good problem-solving skills, as well as eagerness to join us to do meaningful work. We require experience in mental health and substance abuse work. The task requires knowledge of the Finnish language. Experience in compensation treatment as well as additional training in mental health and substance abuse work are considered an advantage. Knowledge of Swedish is also an advantage. LOVe must be completed or it will be completed at the beginning of the employment relationship.

The eligibility requirement is the legalization of a nurse in accordance with the Act on Healthcare Professionals (559/1994).

Apply for a position and become part of a team where your work matters every day.

We are the workplace of approximately 23,000 experts and one of the largest employers in our country. We make sure that all half a million people in our region get the social and health services they need, and we secure rescue operations. We work on important issues that affect everyone!

We are #do-gooders!

Roosa Tenhunen
assistant ward manager
roosa.tenhunen@varha.fi
tel. 044 3118421

Submitting the application: The application must be submitted via the electronic application form.

title: Classroom teacher, Hannuniitu school
what_we_expect: you meet pupils/students as individuals and want to guide and support the growth of the child/youth
you are linguistically aware and consider the students' linguistic background in teaching
you have good cooperation and interaction skills
you are an active and development-oriented team worker
Turku schools offer the advantages of a big city:
support from colleagues and a strong sense of community - you won't be alone
functional multi-professional cooperation with study care professionals
the opportunity to change workplaces and develop career paths
active development culture and teamwork
In the service of the City of Turku, you get:
job_responsibilities: attendance assistant for elementary school lower classes
what_we_offer: support from colleagues and a strong sense of community - you won't be alone
functional multi-professional cooperation with study care professionals
the opportunity to change workplaces and develop career paths
active development culture and teamwork
In the service of the City of Turku, you get: versatile training opportunities
For cheaper bus journeys with Föl's business travel card
Tyky wristband for the city's sports and cultural services
Come and work at a school where learning is a joy and meeting is valuable!
Workplace address: Hannunniitu school, Virmuntie 3, 20540 Turku
Office lv. 2026-27 Halisten unit, Paavinkatu 13, 20540 Turku
Come and make the Turku of the future!

More than 210,000 people from Turku already live along the Aura River, in the lap of the world's most beautiful archipelago. In 2029, our city will be 800 years old, and we are moving towards it with sustainability at the forefront.
jobcontent:
We are looking for a classroom teacher, primary location Hannunniitu school
The position starts on August 1, 2026 and is an open-ended employment relationship.

We are looking for a competent and motivated class teacher who appreciates working together and teamwork.
We value a humane and understanding work approach and encounter. Good interaction and working community skills are part of this outlook.

Versatile competence in teaching elementary school subjects is important, because we strive for wholesome classroom teaching. Teaching skills and art subjects, especially music and crafts, as well as languages, make the above possible.

We value active responsibility in managing the school's common tasks. Fostering and developing community spirit are important goals for us.

Hannunniitu school is a combined general education and special education school with more than 600 students and more than 100 employees. The school functions as a neighborhood school for students in the residential area and as a centralized service school for all students in Turku who need a special class.
The school currently operates in three units within a radius of a few kilometers from each other.

A strong competence of special classes is teaching deaf, hard-of-hearing and speech-impaired students.

We consider it important to meet people with dignity. We want to offer our students and employees a humane, understanding and competent working community and operating culture.

Eligibility requirements are determined according to the decree on educational staff eligibility requirements (986/1998). The person elected to the position must submit a statement of his health (KVhL § 7) and a criminal record extract in accordance with § 6 subsection 2 of the Criminal Records Act (Act on investigating the criminal background of those working with children 504/2002). A probationary period is observed in the employment relationship.

We expect you to
 you meet pupils/students as individuals and want to guide and support the growth of the child/youth 
 you are linguistically aware and consider the students' linguistic background in teaching
 you have good cooperation and interaction skills
 you are an active and development-oriented team worker

Turku schools offer the advantages of a big city:
 support from colleagues and a strong sense of community - you won't be alone
 functional multi-professional cooperation with study care professionals
 the opportunity to change workplaces and develop career paths
 active development culture and teamwork

In the service of the City of Turku, you get:
 versatile training opportunities
 For cheaper bus journeys with Föl's business travel card
 Tyky wristband for the city's sports and cultural services

Come and work at a school where learning is a joy and meeting is valuable!

In order to promote equality and equality, the city of Turku prefers anonymous recruitment. In practice, this means that in the first stage of the recruitment process, the open questions of the job application should not include information about e.g. age, mother tongue or gender. Although some information is asked in the background information, this information is not visible to the recruiting line manager in the anonymous applicant report. 

Workplace address: Hannunniitu school, Virmuntie 3, 20540 Turku
Office lv. 2026-27 Halisten unit, Paavinkatu 13, 20540 Turku

Come and make the Turku of the future!

More than 210,000 people from Turku already live along the Aura River, in the lap of the world's most beautiful archipelago. In 2029, our city will be 800 years old, and we are moving towards it with sustainability at the forefront. 

The city of Turku is one of the largest employers in its region. More than 6,000 professionals in versatile positions work not only for today, but also for the future.

Timo Lehtinen, principal
timo.lehtinen@edu.turku.fi, 
0400 944 245 (7 - 10 April 2026)

Eva Aitasalo, assistant principal 
eva.aitasalo@edu.turku.fi, 
0403559081

 Sami Kluuskeri, assistant principal
sami.kluuskeri@edu.turku.fi, 
0401792588

Submitting an application: The position is primarily applied electronically from the section Apply for a job. Written applications must be submitted before the end of the application period to the address, Children and youth service complex, PO Box 355, 20101, Turku

title: Earth construction worker working for destinations in Turku
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
what_we_expect: Previous experience in earthworks
Knowledge of tube and plane lasers
Image literacy
Ability to work independently
A valid occupational safety card
A brisk, self-initiated and responsible approach to work
what_we_offer: Competitive and negotiable salary
Salary payment every 2 weeks
High-quality work clothes
A fair and professional team
Long-term work
Please feel free to state your salary expectations in the application.
Search & additional information
The work starts as soon as a suitable employee is found.
Feel free to ask for more information about the task (weekdays 08.00-16.00):
Kim Tuovinen
jobcontent:
For our client, we are looking for an earthworks worker / co-pilot for excavation and yard construction projects (Turku)

We are looking for a brisk and professional earth construction worker (helmsman) for excavation and yard construction sites in the Turku area. The work sites are mainly located in Turku and nearby areas, and the working days start in Lieto.

You will work as an excavator driver at various construction sites. The works include e.g. assisting with excavation work, piping, measurements, filling and finishing yard areas.

Tasks, e.g.

 * Foundation works of detached houses
 * Undercover and yard construction work
 * Finishing of yard areas
 * Assisting the excavator driver on construction sites

The work is physical and varied, with the right attitude you can go far.

We expect from you

 * Previous experience in earthworks
 * Knowledge of tube and plane lasers
 * Image reading skills
 * Ability to work independently
 * A valid occupational safety card
 * Energetic, self-initiated and responsible approach to work

We offer you

 * Competitive and negotiable salary
 * Salary payment every 2 weeks
 * High-quality work clothes
 * A fair and professional team
 * Long-term work

Please feel free to state your salary expectations in the application.

Search & additional information
The work starts as soon as a suitable employee is found. 

Feel free to ask for more information about the task (weekdays 08.00-16.00):
Kim Tuovinen

040 153 8108

kim.tuovinen@infrafour.fi

infrafour.fi
